records.question: Which people named Clary Sermina Delgado Cid are at most 1.75 meters tall and have vault points at most 9.537, floor exercise points at most 9.687, and total points at most 57.424?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN gymnast ON people.people_id = gymnast.gymnast_id
WHERE gymnast.vault_points <= 9.537 AND people.name = 'Clary Sermina Delgado Cid' AND gymnast.floor_exercise_points <= 9.687 AND people.height <= 1.75 AND gymnast.total_points <= 57.424
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.People_ID FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN gymnast AS T2 ON T1.People_ID = T2.Gymnast_ID WHERE T1.Name = 'Clary Sermina Delgado Cid' AND T1.Height <= 1.75 AND T2.Vault_Points <= 9.537 AND T2.Floor_Exercise_Points <= 9.687 AND T2.Total_Points <= 57.424

records.question: Which gymnasts from Santiago de los Caballeros who are at most 21 years old have at least 9.5 points on the horizontal bar, at least 9.725 on parallel bars, no more than 9.687 on floor exercise, and no more than 9.537 on vault?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN gymnast ON people.people_id = gymnast.gymnast_id
WHERE people.hometown = 'Santiago de los Caballeros' AND gymnast.horizontal_bar_points >= 9.5 AND gymnast.floor_exercise_points <= 9.687 AND gymnast.parallel_bars_points >= 9.725 AND gymnast.vault_points <= 9.537 AND people.age <= 21.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.People_ID FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN gymnast AS T2 ON T1.People_ID = T2.Gymnast_ID WHERE T1.Hometown = 'Santiago de los Caballeros' AND T1.Age <= 21 AND T2.Horizontal_Bar_Points >= 9.5 AND T2.Parallel_Bars_Points >= 9.725 AND T2.Floor_Exercise_Points <= 9.687 AND T2.Vault_Points <= 9.537

records.question: Who are the people from Los Alcarrizos who are at most 24 years old and at least 1.72 meters tall, and who are gymnasts with exactly 57.374 total points, 9.525 pommel horse points, 9.625 parallel bars points, and 9.55 horizontal bar points?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN gymnast ON people.people_id = gymnast.gymnast_id
WHERE gymnast.total_points = 57.374 AND people.age <= 24.0 AND gymnast.pommel_horse_points = 9.525 AND people.height >= 1.72 AND gymnast.horizontal_bar_points = 9.55 AND people.hometown = 'Los Alcarrizos' AND gymnast.parallel_bars_points = 9.625
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.People_ID FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN gymnast AS T2 ON T1.People_ID = T2.Gymnast_ID WHERE T1.Hometown = 'Los Alcarrizos' AND T1.Age <= 24 AND T1.Height >= 1.72 AND T2.Total_Points = 57.374 AND T2.Pommel_Horse_Points = 9.525 AND T2.Parallel_Bars_Points = 9.625 AND T2.Horizontal_Bar_Points = 9.55
